target.title: fix(agents): keep lightweight cron prompts out of no-op compaction
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Refs #96658. This is a partial mitigation only; it does not close the broader issue.

Lightweight isolated cron runs on very small context windows can reserve too much of the model window before the first prompt is sent. In the reported 4,096-token fallback-model case, current `main` leaves only 2,048 prompt tokens for a 3,544-token lightweight cron prompt, so the precheck routes to `compact_only` even though the lightweight bootstrap has no useful history to compact.

## Why This Change Was Made

This keeps the shared small-context prompt floor conservative: `MIN_PROMPT_BUDGET_RATIO` remains `0.5` for full-context callers, settings reserve capping, CLI compaction, mid-turn guard paths, prompt-image runs, tool-enabled runs, provider-native-tool runs, and lightweight shared-history runs.

The higher 87.5% prompt share is scoped only to history-free lightweight pre-prompt admission with no prompt images and no active OpenClaw, client, or provider-native tool schemas. For explicit no-tool cron runs, `toolsAllow: []` uses the same minimal prompt surface as other runtime tool allowlists so the no-tool path is represented in the real embedded attempt.

No SDK shape, config, docs, workflow, provider transport, or global budget policy is changed.

## User Impact

History-free lightweight cron jobs can avoid no-op compact-only recovery only when the rendered boundary prompt fits the raised prompt budget and no prompt images, active tools, provider-native tools, or shared history are present.

Tool-enabled runs, prompt-image runs, shared-history lightweight runs, direct OpenAI Responses runs with provider-native `web_search`, and non-lightweight/full-context paths keep conservative behavior. Provider/tool-heavy budgeting is left out of scope for this PR.

## Evidence

Current-head helper behavior for the 4,096-token / 20,000-reserve boundary:

```text
history-free lightweight, no prompt images, no active tools: route=fits, promptBudgetBeforeReserve=3584, effectiveReserveTokens=512
history-free lightweight with prompt image: route=compact_only, promptBudgetBeforeReserve=2048
history-free lightweight with active OpenClaw/client tools: route=compact_only, promptBudgetBeforeReserve=2048
history-free lightweight with provider-native OpenAI web_search: provider-native tool count=1, shared floor preserved
lightweight with shared history: route=compact_only, promptBudgetBeforeReserve=2048
full-context mode: route=compact_only, promptBudgetBeforeReserve=2048
```

Current-head real isolated cron proof on `c7c28ed13d9`:

```text
one-off temp proof harness
# Started a temp Gateway from this checkout and scripts/e2e/mock-openai-server.mjs.
# Configured mock OpenAI Responses provider openai/gpt-5.5 with contextWindow=4096, contextTokens=4096, maxTokens=512.
# Set agents.defaults.compaction.reserveTokens=20000.
# Added an isolated lightContext cron job through Gateway cron.add with payload.toolsAllow=[] and delivery.mode=none.
# Ran the product cron runner and waited for completion.
status=ok
route=fits
estimatedPromptTokens=2744
promptBudgetBeforeReserve=3584
overflowTokens=0
toolResultReducibleChars=0
reserveTokens=20000
effectiveReserveTokens=512
contextTokenBudget=4096
messages=0
unwindowedMessages=0
responsesRequests=2
```

Focused validation on head `c7c28ed13d9`:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts extensions/openai/openai-provider.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner-extraparams.test.ts
# PASS: 5 files, 329 tests

node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo
# PASS

node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts
# PASS

git diff --check
# PASS
```

Current PR surface after the native-tool repair:

```text
src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.test.ts +36/-0
src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.run-decisions.ts      +59/-0
src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts                    +16/-3
src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.test.ts +77/-0
src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/preemptive-compaction.ts      +20/-1
Total: +208/-4 across 5 files
```

Review comments addressed:

- Scope reduction: reverted the provider-visible OpenAI Responses/Completions tool-budgeting layer and its follow-up lint commit.
- Codex / ClawSweeper image follow-up: prompt-image lightweight runs stay on the shared floor.
- ClawSweeper tool follow-up, narrowed form: active OpenClaw/client-tool lightweight runs stay on the shared floor; this PR no longer claims provider/tool-heavy fits.
- ClawSweeper native-tool follow-up: direct OpenAI Responses native `web_search` now contributes to the precheck tool count, so those runs stay on the shared floor instead of taking the no-tool raised budget.
- ClawSweeper proof follow-up: added current-head real isolated cron proof for the narrowed no-active-tools behavior.
- ClawSweeper scope follow-up: removed closing syntax for #96658 because the current PR is not a complete issue fix.

Autoreview: attempted one local review round after the latest repair, but the helper failed before review due local Codex config parsing (`service_tier = priority`; helper expected `fast` or `flex`). No autoreview findings were produced.

Agent transcript: a matching local session was found, but no transcript is included because adding sanitized transcript logs requires explicit approval.
target.author: monkeyleet
